summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mishant Gandhi Portfolio website. All features working correctly - backend health endpoint, all UI sections (Header, Hero, Skills Ribbon, About, Skills, Experience/Education tabs, Contact), navigation links, and form interactions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portfolio website fully functional. Backend has single /api/health endpoint. Frontend is static React SPA with all sections working: Header (navy blue #003554), Hero (beige #f5f1ed with profile photo), Skills Ribbon (marquee animation), About (2x2 grid), Skills (8 cards with progress bars), Experience/Education (tabbed interface with 3 cards each), Contact (form with mailto: integration, LinkedIn and WhatsApp links). Contact form uses mailto: protocol (MOCKED - not backend API).

header.details: Navy blue background (#003554), 'Mishant Gandhi' text with green pulsing dot, all 5 navigation links present and working

hero_section.details: Beige background (#f5f1ed), profile photo loads correctly, 'Hello, I'm Mishant.' title, CA/CS badges, Send a Message button with pulsing green dot, Explore My Work button, 5,214 Followers / 5,000+ Connections stats

skills_ribbon.details: Navy blue background with gold text, marquee animation scrolling finance-related skills

about_section.details: Soft beige background (#efece6), 2x2 grid with 4 numbered expertise areas (Financial Control, Group Consolidation, Performance & Planning, Process & Transformation)

skills_section.details: 4-column grid with 8 skill cards with progress bars (Financial Reporting 95%, IFRS Standards 92%, Group Consolidation 90%, Audit & Assurance 93%, Tax Advisory 88%, Financial Analysis 90%, ICV Audit 85%, VAT Tax 87%)

experience_education_tabs.details: Tabbed interface working - Experience tab shows 3 job cards (Group Financial Controller, Senior Finance Manager, Audit Senior), Education tab shows 3 qualification cards (CA, CS, B.Com)

contact_section.details: Left-side info (name, email, phone, location), right-side form (name, email, message fields), form inputs working, LinkedIn and WhatsApp social links present with correct URLs

navigation.details: All navigation links scroll to correct sections (Home->hero, About->about, Skills->skills, Experience->experience, Let's Collaborate->contact)

mocked_apis.contact_form: Uses mailto: protocol instead of backend API - opens email client with pre-filled subject and body
